title: About Us
content:
[vc_row type=”in_container” full_screen_row_position=”middle” column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” scene_position=”center” text_color=”dark” text_align=”left” row_border_radius=”none” row_border_radius_applies=”bg” overflow=”visible” overlay_strength=”0.3″ gradient_direction=”left_to_right” shape_divider_position=”bottom” bg_image_animation=”none”][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

ABOUT US

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Kryptonite International Limited was founded by Mr Umesh Bhojwani 2016 which only started trading in 2017 after registering an electronics brand and trademark known as Vision Plus. We started as a small-scale importer of LED TVs for the local market in Nairobi. We have grown at over 100 % year on year in the past 2 years. We are looking to partner with businesses where we can lead with long term relationships. Vision Plus was created to provide high-quality electronic products to the market at affordable prices with after-sales service second to none. The product range started off with LED TVs and now has also diversified into sound systems.[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”20px”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row OUR MISSION

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Vision Plus looks to provide high quality products that are at competitive prices whilst focusing on customer satisfaction and continuously improving as a OUR VISION

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Vision Plus looks to provide high quality products that are at competitive prices whilst focusing on customer satisfaction and continuously improving as a business.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner equal_height=”yes” column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”padding-10-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” advanced_gradient=”linear-gradient(124deg, rgb(217,38,42) 0%, rgb(226,101,42) 100%)” advanced_gradient_angle=”124″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”default” gradient_type=”advanced” advanced_gradient_display_type=”linear”][vc_column_text]

OUR CORE VALUES

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Continuous Improvement

Lead by innovation and continuously looking at what can be improved upon within our business to reach our ultimate goal of being a Brand of choice.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”padding-10-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” advanced_gradient=”linear-gradient(120deg, rgb(31,167,72) 0%, rgb(200,214,50) 100%)” advanced_gradient_angle=”120″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”default” gradient_type=”advanced” advanced_gradient_display_type=”linear”][vc_column_text]

OUR CORE VALUES

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Customer First

Always put the customer first making it imperative that we meet their needs.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”padding-5-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” top_margin=”20px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” advanced_gradient=”linear-gradient(140deg, rgb(249,20,20) 10%, rgb(237,106,11) 90%)” advanced_gradient_angle=”140″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”default” gradient_type=”advanced” advanced_gradient_display_type=”linear”][vc_column_text]

OUR CORE VALUES

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Ethics and Integrity

Value all key stakeholders and treat all aspects with good ethics and integrity.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”padding-5-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” top_margin=”20px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” advanced_gradient=”linear-gradient(125deg, rgb(58, 42, 116) 10%, rgb(126, 43, 124) 90%)” advanced_gradient_angle=”125″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid” column_padding_type=”default” gradient_type=”advanced” advanced_gradient_display_type=”linear”][vc_column_text]

OUR CORE VALUES

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Team Work

Work collaboratively and efficiently in all business matters within our diverse environment to achieve a common goal while valuing all feedback.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type=”in_container” full_screen_row_position=”middle” column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” scene_position=”center” text_color=”dark” text_align=”left” row_border_radius=”none” row_border_radius_applies=”bg” overflow=”visible” id=”retailers” overlay_strength=”0.3″ gradient_direction=”left_to_right” shape_divider_position=”bottom” bg_image_animation=”none” gradient_type=”default” shape_type=””][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

PARTNERS

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text max_width=”400″]Looking for our products? They are available through a variety of reputable vendors. Here are just a few of the many places you can find us:[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”30px”][vc_column_text]

seo.title: About Vision Plus Kenya | Most Affordable TV Brand
seo.description: At Vision Plus, our vision looks to provide high quality products that are at competitive prices whilst focusing on customer satisfaction. Read more.
